imageAlt: Remove ‘approve app’ step for mobile OAuth login roadmap item preview image
title: Remove ‘approve app’ step for mobile OAuth login
summaryBody: We’re initially releasing OAuth login with an ‘approve app’ step, but we could remove this for the mobile app specifically by implementing app attestation. Estimated at about 1-2 sprints of work, and would require some time from Core Services
detailBody: We’re initially releasing OAuth login with an ‘approve app’ step, but we could remove this for the mobile app specifically by implementing app attestation. Estimated at about 1-2 sprints of work, and would require some time from Core Services
